commentary_text: The model favors Canada at 41%, while the market favors Switzerland at 45%, a 17-percentage-point gap on the Switzerland win outcome. This reversal of favorites could reflect market information about recent form, injuries, or lineup changes unavailable to the model at its last update. Polymarket pricing aligns closely with sportsbook consensus, suggesting the market view is cohesive across venues. The dashboard surfaces this divergence as a signal for monitoring; neither source has privileged access to ground truth.
